hooks.command: FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -qv 'architecture.html'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "PostToolUse", "additionalContext": "ARCHITECTURE REMINDER: You just modified a source file. Check if this change affects the architecture diagram (architecture.html). If it adds/removes/changes routes, functions, components, data flows, or connections — update architecture.html to reflect the current state."}}'; fi
